policies.hypothesisPolicy: Hypotheses authorize dossier curation only and are never ground truth.
policies.pointInTimePolicy: Every pilot feature must preserve observation date, acquisition timestamp, provider publication/vintage date when available, raw hash and methodology regime.
policies.hardNegativePolicy: Hard negatives require affirmative mechanism-specific evidence of orderly functioning; absence of stress, low index values and unlabeled months are insufficient.
policies.outerOosPolicy: No outer feature or outcome may be read during feasibility analysis.
